caption: Nyx. They think I'm just another model in the rain. But I know this city better than its code. The neon cherry blossoms glow against my synthetic skin, and the tight bodysuit hugs every curve I keep secret from the prying eyes. The humidity clings to the mesh, and the data-link hums at my hip. Tonight isn't about survival; it's about being seen. The air smells like ozone and jasmine. I adjust the collar, knowing exactly what happens when the shadows part. 🌸🌃 #CyberpunkVibes #NeonSpring #TechFashion
